title: Tender Garlicky Oyster Mushroom Stir-fry
description: A delicious Australian dish featuring oyster mushrooms that appeals to midnight cravings and is also friendly for Jains. It's a tasty stir-fry recipe with garlic, making it savory and aromatic.

ingredients.name: Oyster mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are fully dried if using dried mushrooms.

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant, being careful not to burn it.
Stir in oyster mushrooms and season with salt and pepper. Cook until they are tender but still have some texture.
Toss in chopped scallions and cook for another minute.
Drizzle soy sauce over the top and stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Serve immediately while hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
